special_math_system.core_statement: The candidate mathematics is special because it must combine stratified charts, attached fibers, admissible cones, path bundles, and restricted overlaps in one object.

components.stratified_base: H(I) = (B_family, E_concept, F_attr, F_rel, F_stress, P_path, O_overlap)
components.admissible_cones: A = K_ret INTERSECT K_id INTERSECT K_read INTERSECT K_phase INTERSECT K_bridge
components.viability_strata: M_feas = UNION_m U_m with transition maps phi_(m->n) defined only on overlaps U_m INTERSECT U_n
components.bundle_view: H(I) = (B_family, E_concept, F_attr, F_rel, F_stress, P_path, O_overlap)
components.system_view: Sys*(I) = (H(I), A(I), M_feas(I), F, Q, R)

why_existing_math_is_insufficient.flat_vector_limit: flat vectors do not capture family-conditioned sections and restricted overlaps
why_existing_math_is_insufficient.single_manifold_limit: one smooth manifold does not capture switching and chart-specific regimes
why_existing_math_is_insufficient.simple_dynamics_limit: ordinary dynamics do not encode admissible path constraints and overlap-gated transport

candidate_principles.principle_1: encoding objects are sections over family-patch strata, not isolated points
candidate_principles.principle_2: update legality is defined by intersecting cone families, not one scalar threshold
candidate_principles.principle_3: memory, relation, and readout are attached fibers, not one shared flat space
candidate_principles.principle_4: usable computation proceeds along admissible paths, not arbitrary local steps
candidate_principles.principle_5: system-level properties are projections of this same structure

verdict.core_answer: A special mathematical system is now emerging: one that combines stratified geometry, fiber structure, path constraints, and admissible-update law in a single theory object.
verdict.next_theory_target: use these principles to derive stronger falsifiable predictions and more radical operator-form changes
